grant_title: New Hampshire Bar Foundation Justice Grants
deadline: Applications for the next grant cycle will be available towards the end of 2027
project_area: Innovation in the administration of justice, community education about the law, and improved access to the legal system
demographic_requirements: Projects must envision new ways to create equal justice for all people, address legal needs important in a democratic society, and build public confidence in the justice system
eligibility_summary: Open to New Hampshire nonprofit organizations and/or programs that propose innovative justice-related projects, excluding ongoing operational support. Grants are funded biennially (even-numbered years) and focus on start-up costs, planning, research, or stabilization of new programs.
